specs.title: cp-000: Glass-panel styling on each card
cp-001: Icons render with correct accent color background
cp-002: Stats show 0 for new users not blank or error
cp-003: Section title Active Manuscripts displayed
cp-004: View Archive link in header navigates to projects
cp-005: Glass-panel container wraps the project list
cp-006: When no projects exist No projects yet Create your first manuscript to get start
cp-007: Each row shows document icon
cp-008: Each row shows project title font-serif
cp-009: Each row shows relative time eg 2h ago 3d ago
cp-010: Each row shows project type converted from snake_case to Title Case
cp-011: Each row shows status badge with correct variant
cp-012: Each row shows right-arrow icon
cp-013: Clicking a row navigates to studioprojectid
cp-014: Hover background color changes text color changes
cp-015: Separator lines between rows not after last row
cp-016: 60 seconds Just now
cp-017: 60 minutes Nm ago eg 5m ago
cp-018: 24 hours Nh ago eg 2h ago
cp-019: 7 days Nd ago eg 3d ago
cp-020: 7 days Date string eg Jan 15
cp-021: Section title Recent Searches displayed
cp-022: Search link in header navigates to research
cp-023: Glass-panel container
cp-024: When no searches No searches yet Start exploring academic papers
cp-025: MagnifyingGlass icon on each row
cp-026: Original query text displayed
cp-027: Result count shown eg 42 results
cp-028: Creation time displayed relative format
cp-029: Source shown if not all
cp-030: Separator lines between rows
cp-031: Hover background color changes
cp-032: Section title Recent Activity displayed
